description: MCP server exposing Keycloak Admin REST API as MCP tools, generated via metaprogramming from vendored OpenAPI spec.

testCommands.unit: pytest tests/test_config.py tests/test_parser.py tests/test_auth.py tests/test_errors.py tests/test_generator.py

parallelizationNotes.wave1: T0.2 (2), T0.3 (3) independent of T0.1 (1) and of each other — run in parallel.
parallelizationNotes.wave2: T1.1 (4) and T1.2 (5) both depend only on T0.1 (1) — parallel.
parallelizationNotes.wave3: T1.3 (6) depends on T1.2 (5); T2.1-T2.5 (7-11) depend only on T1.1 (4) — all run in parallel within this wave.
parallelizationNotes.wave4: T3.1-T3.3 (12-14) all depend on T1.3 (6), T2.4 (10), T2.5 (11) — convergence point, then parallel among themselves.
parallelizationNotes.wave5: T4.1 (15), T4.2 (16) depend on all of wave4 (12,13,14) — sequential bottleneck before parallel pair.
parallelizationNotes.wave6: T5.1-T5.4 (17-20) all depend on T4.1 (15) and T4.2 (16) — parallel packaging/docs/coverage/smoke tasks.
